ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield, 2024-25 Final: Victoria vs South Australia

summary: The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is commencing today, March 26, 2026. There are no scheduled matches for the Chandigarh T20 or the AFC U20 Asian Cup China, 2025, as that tournament concluded in March 2025.
